idea-plugin.name: Transitrix Studio
idea-plugin.description:
Architecture-as-code for the modern enterprise — live notation previews inside IntelliJ IDEA and the other JetBrains IDEs.

Describe your organisation in plain YAML and Transitrix Studio renders the diagram right in the editor: goals trees, FGCA / FGA chains, activity networks, nested blocks, applications, products, process maps, scenarios, capability maps, process blueprints, and activity cards. These are the same diagrams the VS Code extension produces, rendered through the shared @transitrix/diagrams engine in a JCEF webview.

Open any *.transitrix.yaml file, or right-click and choose Transitrix: Preview Notation. Your architecture lives in text — diff it, version it, and review it like code. Previews are read-only; you author in YAML.

Built on ArchiMate 3.2. Open source, MIT licensed.

action.description: Open a read-only Transitrix notation preview for the current file.
